scripts.validate: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run test
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @lifeos/event-bus test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/life-graph test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/goal-engine test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/module-loader test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/module-cache test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/calendar-module test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/scheduler-module test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/reminder-module test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/research-module test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/notes-module test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/weather-module test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/news-module test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/personality test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/orchestrator test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/voice-core test && pnpm --filter @lifeos/cli test
